title: Moments
subtitle: A social app, integrating Wechat, Twitter and Tiktok
overview: This project is a dynamic fusion of WeChat, Twitter, and TikTok, creating a unique social experience that brings together the best features of these popular platforms. This innovative application is built on a modern tech stack, leveraging Next.js, Apollo, and Prisma to deliver a seamless and engaging social networking experience.

features.name: Interactive Feed
features.detail: Utilizes Apollo Client and GraphQL for efficient data fetching, providing a real-time, interactive, and visually engaging feed. Incorporates GSAP for smooth animations, enhancing the overall user experience.

features.name: Multi-Media Content
features.detail: Supports a variety of content types, including images, videos, and interactive media, offering a rich and diverse user experience. Replicate UI from TikTok's content presentation.

features.name: Real-time Interactions
features.detail: Enables real-time engagement with friends and followers through GraphQL subscriptions, ensuring instant updates on comments, likes, and shares. Aiming for a Wechat-like conversational experience.

features.name: Authentication and Security
features.detail: Implements secure user authentication with Next-Auth, supporting various authentication providers for a safe and hassle-free login experience. Prioritizes user data security through GraphQL and Prisma.

title: Discord Clone
subtitle: A discord clone with basic functions integrated such as group chat and voice chat
overview: The Discord Clone Web App is a real-time communication platform designed to replicate the functionality and experience of the popular Discord application. It provides users with a seamless and interactive environment for text, voice, and video communication, tailored for community building and collaboration.

features.name: Real-time Messaging
features.detail: Instantly exchange text messages with friends or within community channels. Utilizes Socket.IO for real-time updates and synchronization.

features.name: Voice and Video Chat
features.detail: Enable voice and video communication within servers or direct messages. Integration with Agora RTC SDK for high-quality audio and video streaming.

features.name: User Authentication
features.detail: Secure user authentication using Firebase Authentication. Authorization ensures a personalized and secure environment.

features.name: Channel Organization
features.detail: Create and join different channels for focused discussions. Simple and intuitive channel management.

title: Portfolio Website
subtitle: Personal Portfolio Website
overview: The Portfolio Website is a showcase of your skills, experiences, and projects, serving as an online presence to highlight your frontend development expertise. With a modern and responsive design, it aims to impress potential employers, collaborators, and clients, providing them with insights into your capabilities and achievements.

features.name: Interactive Design
features.detail: Utilizes GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) for smooth and engaging animations, creating an interactive and visually appealing user experience. Responsive design with MUI (Material-UI) components for consistency across various devices.

features.name: Project Showcase
features.detail: Showcases your frontend projects with detailed descriptions and interactive elements. Integration of react-share for easy social media sharing of your projects.

features.name: Contact Form with reCAPTCHA
features.detail: Implements a secure contact form with reCAPTCHA verification using react-google-recaptcha. Allows potential employers or collaborators to reach out while preventing spam.

features.name: Technology Stack
features.detail: Developed using React and React Router for a single-page application. Utilizes MongoDB and Mongoose for data storage and retrieval. Express.js server for backend logic, configured with CORS for secure API communication.

process: I was planning to build this portfolio website from scratch. However, with little knowledge of UI design, during development I decided to add Material UI to accelerate delivery and simulate a real-world production process.

title: LaoMa Spicy
subtitle: LaoMa Spicy Official Website
introduction: I'm thrilled to introduce my personal project, LaoMa Spicy, inspired by the culinary excellence of a renowned Chinese restaurant nestled in the heart of Greenwich Village, Manhattan, New York City.
overview: LaoMa Spicy pays homage to the authentic flavors and rich culinary heritage of the eponymous restaurant, celebrated city-wide for its Sichuan dry hot pot and mouthwatering spicy hot stew. This digital venture is designed to extend the restaurant's reach, offering a virtual space for spice enthusiasts to explore, savor, and connect.

features.name: Virtual Menu Exploration
features.detail: Dive into a virtual menu showcasing the restaurant's signature Sichuan dry hot pot and spicy hot stew.

features.name: Community Engagement
features.detail: Connect with fellow spice enthusiasts, share culinary experiences, and discover new ways to elevate your spice game.

features.name: Visual Feast
features.detail: Immerse yourself in a visually stunning representation of the restaurant's ambiance and signature dishes.

process: Order online, mobile-ready responsive design, streamlined interactions with menu and shopping cart, embedded map, plus integrated Google Review API and Instagram Basic Display API.
results: This project has been a strong learning experience and reinforced my commitment to building frontend solutions that capture the soul of a brand.

title: Gaggle
subtitle: Google Search Clone
overview: Gaggle is a Google Search Clone that allows users to search for results such as news, images, and videos with a free Google Search API provided by the RapidAPI community.

features.name: Real-time Search
features.detail: Instantly fetches search results as the user types with use-debounce. Utilizes React and MUI components to deliver a dynamic, responsive UI.

features.name: Multimedia Integration
features.detail: Displays relevant videos using react-player for a richer search experience and stronger user engagement.

features.name: Responsive Design
features.detail: Provides a seamless experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices with a clean Tailwind CSS visual style.

features.name: Loading Spinner
features.detail: Uses react-loader-spinner to provide visual feedback while data is loading.

process: The goal was to replicate Google-like user experience. The first challenge was finding usable mock/free API data. Once solved, I reproduced the layout and theme quickly with Tailwind CSS.
results: End users can search and browse up to 100 results.

title: TripAdvisor
subtitle: Trip Advisor Clone
overview: The Travel Advisor App is a dynamic and user-friendly web application designed to assist users in planning and exploring travel destinations. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies, it provides users with valuable information about various locations, attractions, and recommendations.

features.name: Interactive Map
features.detail: Utilizes Google Maps API and google-map-react for an interactive and visually rich map experience with dynamic markers and info windows.

features.name: Location Recommendations
features.detail: Integrates third-party APIs (such as TripAdvisor or Yelp) to fetch real-time recommendations and reviews for restaurants, hotels, and attractions.

features.name: Sass Styling
features.detail: Implements Sass for efficient and maintainable styling with a polished, customized visual language.

title: Explore Amazon API
subtitle: Amazon Product Details Data API
overview: Explore Amazon API gives access to Amazon product details such as prices, ranks, reviews, and offers in JSON format.

features.name: Amazon product data service
features.detail: Provides Amazon product information for end users, with records for likes and favorites, backed by MongoDB.

title: LaoMa Spicy Waitlist System
subtitle: LaoMa Spicy Customer Queue System
overview: LaoMa Spicy Waitlist System is a quick waitlist system for restaurant customers.

features.name: Queue flow
features.detail: Enter information, get a queue number, and wait to be called for seating.

process: This system was developed quickly and implemented for outdoor dining operations during Covid-19.
